svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

pageWidth="1240" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1"
